items.title: qa-matrix: cover Matrix allowlist hot reload
items.summary: qa-matrix: cover Matrix allowlist hot reload Add a Matrix QA scenario that removes an observer from the running account group allowlist and verifies the existing gateway stops replying without relying on a channel restart. The scenario disables generic config reload and defers restart during the probe so it specifically covers the Matrix handler per-message live allowlist read.
